caption: An elderly man with white hair and glasses, wearing a blue patterned button-down shirt, stands behind a wooden podium giving a presentation in a room with wood-paneled walls and blinds. He is speaking into a microphone and gesturing with his hands. The podium features a red logo with a white tree design and the word "ORCA" appearing as text on the right side of the screen. In the foreground, the backs of several audience members' heads are visible, including people with brown and blonde hair. A black speaker is mounted on the wall to the left. As the sequence progresses, the man shifts his posture, moving his hands and adjusting his position while continuing to address the audience. The overall setting is a professional or academic environment, and the camera angle remains static throughout the clip.
